# Add Localization (i18n)

Add translation support and localized message bundles (e.g., Spanish default messages).

## Tasks

- Add `TranslateProvider` and message files for supported locales.
- Wrap UI text with translation hooks and extract messages.
- Document process for adding new translations.

## Rationale

Localization broadens accessibility and suits multilingual school communities.

Suggested labels: frontend, enhancement
